TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O ngangan no Malaloong == Matlangay a ngangan no Malaloong o Gong-xia hananay. saheto o finawlan masaPangcahay misao'po i titni. i 'ayaw ho, ira ko sakarawraw no niyaro', o paloma'ay a misatapangay a pangcah itini. nawhani, mapakafolaw no Leno a Pangcah ko malooday a misatapangay a panecah. i ikor no (sowal no holam)Carewan a demak, malinah sato ko aro' no Sakizaya ato Kavalanay itini. anini how i, o Kiwit a tamdaw ka 'alomanay i Malaloong a niyaro'. kasiikedan no niyaro' Misi'ayaw to Taypinyan ko Malaloong, nai Paterungan talatimol tahira i Fakong, mikilawac to riyar a paloma' ko Pangcah,misafonon a malingad paedeng sa to kakaenen, o rama i, ira ko 'osaw mana'ang tada kanga'ayan no palafangay a misalama. o talakapahay a niyaro' no pasawali a 'Amis i Malaloong. itini i caay ka 'alomanay a tamdaw. o tadafangcalay a niyaro' ko Malaloong. o kamaro'an no Malaloong i pasawali i laeno no lotok mililisay to riyar. ano tatra itini i, o saka'ayaway kora fonofonon a manegngen, wa:ta o mamaanay fonon kinian, tadkapahay a nengnengen kora a fonon. Itiya ho, o paherekan to a tayal no omah, o kolong ho ko sakatayal i fonon, saka misaromi'ad a mitalod ko cecay a tamdaw to sapakaen to kolong. o roma i, pasasa' ho to kolong, saka, caay kanca' milirengos a pakaen to kolong, ano pacarcar to a masasa', o papakaenen to ko kolong, komaen to rengos ko kolong i, caay kasasa' ko tamdaw a matayal no omah, minisnis to alaneng ho, miropay ho to ca'ayay karawis a cikaw, mifowahho to nanom a patayra no laenoan a fonon, karorayan ko hatiniay a demak. Tangasa i dadaya, mahaholoholol to idang ko mato'asay i miwikwikan a fasoian i potal no loma', o wawawawa i , mati'enang i ca'ca' minengneng to nika tanengal no fo'is a falatfat i kakarayan. itini i niyaro' ca'edes ko pikalat no cidal to romi'ad, nikaorira mafali to dadaya, makakoeko ko kamangay ho a wawa misataliyoliyok i potal, mikihatiya to nika haholoholol no mato'asay. onini ko orip no i'ayaway a tamdaw, o lekakawa no finawlan no niyaro'. O nikalopisak no Malaloong Itiniay i Fengpin-Siyang no Hualien Siyen ko Malaloong a niyaro', 137 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 342 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 310 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 32 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 68%, Paiwan 1%, Rukai 1%, Kebalan 18%, roma 4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. O finacadan no Yincomin Itini i nowalian a lotok, mililis to riyar, o pasawalian a Pangcah han, o saka'alomanay a finacadan no Yin-cu-min i Taywan. o Pasawali a 'amis ko Malaloong a niyaro' , itini i nowalian a lotok, mililis to riyar, mifater to Kalingko na itira i Fakong talatimol tangasa i Madawdaw, saka pasawali a 'amis han. i tiniay i Fengbin-syang (豐濱鄉 sowal no holam ) no Hualien-siyen (花蓮縣 sowal no holam ) ko Malaloong a niyaro'. o Malalo'ong a niyaro , o Tingalaw a niyaro, o Fakong a niyaro, o Haciliwan a niyaro, o Tidaan a niyaro, o Makota'ay a niyaro, o Laeno a niyaro, o Ticilan a niyaro, o Cawi'a niyaro ato Tafugan a niyaro, moetep a niyaro ko pipolongan. O pitooran no finawlan O pitooran ko finawlan no Malaloong i, ora ma'araway a kiwkay i, ira ko tosa a kinkay i Fata'an, o tingsikiw ato ciwlokiwkay, o ciwlokiwkay a tamdaw ko ka adihay. kalimelaan ko sowal no Kawas, to sakafana' to 'orip no tamdaw, ato awaay to ko kaka to nikafana' to codad how i. itini i ira ko pitooran nangra, pakayni sa'opo no kiwkay, malosakarikec sto sakarakat no 'orip no Yincumin, mamaan ca ko deamk no sapitolon ko niyaro'.
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ == matɾaŋaj a ŋaŋan no~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ o~u *o~uŋ-xia ħananaj. saħəto~u o~u finawɾan masapaŋʦaħaj misao~uʡpo~u i titni. i ʡajaw ħo~u, ira ko~u sakarawraw no~u nijaro~uʡ, o~u paɾo~umaʡaj a misatapaŋaj a paŋʦaħ itini. nawħani, mapakafo~uɾaw no~u ɾəno~u a paŋʦaħ ko~u maɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮaj a misatapaŋaj a panəʦaħ. i iko~ur no~u (so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam)ʦarəwan a ɬ~ɮəmak, maɾinaħ sato~u ko~u aro~uʡ no~u saki*aja ato~u kab~vaɾanaj itini. anini ħo~uw i, o~u kiwit a tamɬ~ɮaw ka ʡaɾo~umanaj i maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ. kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ misiʡajaw to~u tajpinjan ko~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ, nai patəro~u~uŋan taɾatimo~uɾ taħira i fako~uŋ, mikiɾawaʦ to~u rijar a paɾo~umaʡ ko~u paŋʦaħ,misafo~uno~un a maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ paəɬ~ɮəŋ sa to~u kakaənən, o~u rama i, ira ko~u ʡo~usaw manaʡaŋ taɬ~ɮa kaŋaʡajan no~u paɾafaŋaj a misaɾama. o~u taɾakapaħaj a nijaro~uʡ no~u pasawaɾi a ʡamis i maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ. itini i ʦaaj ka ʡaɾo~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u taɬ~ɮafaŋʦaɾaj a nijaro~uʡ ko~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ. o~u kamaro~uʡan no~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ i pasawaɾi i ɾaəno~u no~u ɾo~uto~uk miɾiɾisaj to~u rijar. ano~u tatra itini i, o~u sakaʡajawaj ko~ura fo~uno~ufo~uno~un a manə*ŋən, wa:ta o~u mamaanaj fo~uno~un kinian, taɬ~ɮkapaħaj a nəŋnəŋən ko~ura a fo~uno~un. itija ħo~u, o~u paħərəkan to~u a tajaɾ no~u o~umaħ, o~u ko~uɾo~uŋ ħo~u ko~u sakatajaɾ i fo~uno~un, saka misaro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a mitaɾo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u sapakaən to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ. o~u ro~uma i, pasasaʡ ħo~u to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ, saka, ʦaaj kanʦaʡ miɾirəŋo~us a pakaən to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ, ano~u paʦarʦar to~u a masasaʡ, o~u papakaənən to~u ko~u ko~uɾo~uŋ, ko~umaən to~u rəŋo~us ko~u ko~uɾo~uŋ i, ʦaaj kasasaʡ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a matajaɾ no~u o~umaħ, minisnis to~u aɾanəŋ ħo~u, miro~upaj ħo~u to~u ʦaʡajaj karawis a ʦikaw, mifo~uwaħħo~u to~u nano~um a patajra no~u ɾaəno~uan a fo~uno~un, karo~urajan ko~u ħatiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. taŋasa i ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja, maħaħo~uɾo~uħo~uɾo~uɾ to~u iɬ~ɮaŋ ko~u mato~uʡasaj i miwikwikan a faso~uian i po~utaɾ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, o~u wawawawa i , matiʡənaŋ i ʦaʡʦaʡ minəŋnəŋ to~u nika tanəŋaɾ no~u fo~uʡis a faɾatfat i kakarajan. itini i nijaro~uʡ ʦaʡəɬ~ɮəs ko~u pikaɾat no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ to~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, nikao~urira mafaɾi to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja, makako~uəko~u ko~u kamaŋaj ħo~u a wawa misataɾijo~uɾijo~uk i po~utaɾ, mikiħatija to~u nika ħaħo~uɾo~uħo~uɾo~uɾ no~u mato~uʡasaj. o~unini ko~u o~urip no~u iʡajawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ɾəkakawa no~u finawɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ. o~u nikaɾo~upisak no~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ itiniaj i fəŋpin-sijaŋ no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən sijən ko~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, ro~u~ukai *%, kəb~b~vaɾan **%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umin itini i no~uwaɾian a ɾo~uto~uk, miɾiɾis to~u rijar, o~u pasawaɾian a paŋʦaħ ħan, o~u sakaʡaɾo~umanaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jin-ʦo~u~u-min i tajwan. o~u pasawaɾi a ʡamis ko~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ , itini i no~uwaɾian a ɾo~uto~uk, miɾiɾis to~u rijar, mifatər to~u kaɾiŋko~u na itira i fako~uŋ taɾatimo~uɾ taŋasa i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, saka pasawaɾi a ʡamis ħan. i tiniaj i fəŋb~b~vin-sjaŋ (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sijən (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) ko~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ. o~u maɾaɾo~uʡo~uŋ a nijaro~u , o~u tiŋaɾaw a nijaro~u, o~u fako~uŋ a nijaro~u, o~u ħaʦiɾiwan a nijaro~u, o~u tiɬ~ɮaan a nijaro~u, o~u mako~utaʡaj a nijaro~u, o~u ɾaəno~u a nijaro~u, o~u tiʦiɾan a nijaro~u, o~u ʦawiʡa nijaro~u ato~u tafo~u~u*an a nijaro~u, mo~uətəp a nijaro~u ko~u pipo~uɾo~uŋan. o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan o~u pito~uo~uran ko~u finawɾan no~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ i, o~ura maʡarawaj a kiwkaj i, ira ko~u to~usa a kinkaj i fataʡan, o~u tiŋsikiw ato~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwkaj, o~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwkaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ka aɬ~ɮiħaj. kaɾiməɾaan ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas, to~u sakafanaʡ to~u ʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ato~u awaaj to~u ko~u kaka to~u nikafanaʡ to~u ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ħo~uw i. itini i ira ko~u pito~uo~uran naŋra, pakajni saʡo~upo~u no~u kiwkaj, maɾo~usakarikəʦ sto~u sakarakat no~u ʡo~urip no~u jinʦo~u~umin, mamaan ʦa ko~u ɬ~ɮəamk no~u sapito~uɾo~un ko~u nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: == O ngangan no Malaloong == Matlangay a ngangan no Malaloong o Gong-xia hananay. saheto o finawlan masaPangcahay misao'po i titni. i 'ayaw ho, ira ko sakarawraw no niyaro', o paloma'ay a misatapangay a pangcah itini. nawhani, mapakafolaw no Leno a Pangcah ko malooday a misatapangay a panecah. i ikor no (sowal no holam)Carewan a demak, malinah sato ko aro' no Sakizaya ato Kavalanay itini. anini how i, o Kiwit a tamdaw ka 'alomanay i Malaloong a niyaro'. kasiikedan no niyaro' Misi'ayaw to Taypinyan ko Malaloong, nai Paterungan talatimol tahira i Fakong, mikilawac to riyar a paloma' ko Pangcah,misafonon a malingad paedeng sa to kakaenen, o rama i, ira ko 'osaw mana'ang tada kanga'ayan no palafangay a misalama. o talakapahay a niyaro' no pasawali a 'Amis i Malaloong. itini i caay ka 'alomanay a tamdaw. o tadafangcalay a niyaro' ko Malaloong. o kamaro'an no Malaloong i pasawali i laeno no lotok mililisay to riyar. ano tatra itini i, o saka'ayaway kora fonofonon a manegngen, wa:ta o mamaanay fonon kinian, tadkapahay a nengnengen kora a fonon. Itiya ho, o paherekan to a tayal no omah, o kolong ho ko sakatayal i fonon, saka misaromi'ad a mitalod ko cecay a tamdaw to sapakaen to kolong. o roma i, pasasa' ho to kolong, saka, caay kanca' milirengos a pakaen to kolong, ano pacarcar to a masasa', o papakaenen to ko kolong, komaen to rengos ko kolong i, caay kasasa' ko tamdaw a matayal no omah, minisnis to alaneng ho, miropay ho to ca'ayay karawis a cikaw, mifowahho to nanom a patayra no laenoan a fonon, karorayan ko hatiniay a demak. Tangasa i dadaya, mahaholoholol to idang ko mato'asay i miwikwikan a fasoian i potal no loma', o wawawawa i , mati'enang i ca'ca' minengneng to nika tanengal no fo'is a falatfat i kakarayan. itini i niyaro' ca'edes ko pikalat no cidal to romi'ad, nikaorira mafali to dadaya, makakoeko ko kamangay ho a wawa misataliyoliyok i potal, mikihatiya to nika haholoholol no mato'asay. onini ko orip no i'ayaway a tamdaw, o lekakawa no finawlan no niyaro'. O nikalopisak no Malaloong Itiniay i Fengpin-Siyang no Hualien Siyen ko Malaloong a niyaro', 137 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 342 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 310 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 32 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 68%, Paiwan 1%, Rukai 1%, Kebalan 18%, roma 4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. O finacadan no Yincomin Itini i nowalian a lotok, mililis to riyar, o pasawalian a Pangcah han, o saka'alomanay a finacadan no Yin-cu-min i Taywan. o Pasawali a 'amis ko Malaloong a niyaro' , itini i nowalian a lotok, mililis to riyar, mifater to Kalingko na itira i Fakong talatimol tangasa i Madawdaw, saka pasawali a 'amis han. i tiniay i Fengbin-syang (豐濱鄉 sowal no holam ) no Hualien-siyen (花蓮縣 sowal no holam ) ko Malaloong a niyaro'. o Malalo'ong a niyaro , o Tingalaw a niyaro, o Fakong a niyaro, o Haciliwan a niyaro, o Tidaan a niyaro, o Makota'ay a niyaro, o Laeno a niyaro, o Ticilan a niyaro, o Cawi'a niyaro ato Tafugan a niyaro, moetep a niyaro ko pipolongan. O pitooran no finawlan O pitooran ko finawlan no Malaloong i, ora ma'araway a kiwkay i, ira ko tosa a kinkay i Fata'an, o tingsikiw ato ciwlokiwkay, o ciwlokiwkay a tamdaw ko ka adihay. kalimelaan ko sowal no Kawas, to sakafana' to 'orip no tamdaw, ato awaay to ko kaka to nikafana' to codad how i. itini i ira ko pitooran nangra, pakayni sa'opo no kiwkay, malosakarikec sto sakarakat no 'orip no Yincumin, mamaan ca ko deamk no sapitolon ko niyaro'.
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ == matɾaŋaj a ŋaŋan no~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ o~u *o~uŋ-xia ħananaj. saħəto~u o~u finawɾan masapaŋʦaħaj misao~uʡpo~u i titni. i ʡajaw ħo~u, ira ko~u sakarawraw no~u nijaro~uʡ, o~u paɾo~umaʡaj a misatapaŋaj a paŋʦaħ itini. nawħani, mapakafo~uɾaw no~u ɾəno~u a paŋʦaħ ko~u maɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮaj a misatapaŋaj a panəʦaħ. i iko~ur no~u (so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam)ʦarəwan a ɬ~ɮəmak, maɾinaħ sato~u ko~u aro~uʡ no~u saki*aja ato~u kab~vaɾanaj itini. anini ħo~uw i, o~u kiwit a tamɬ~ɮaw ka ʡaɾo~umanaj i maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ. kasiikəɬ~ɮan no~u nijaro~uʡ misiʡajaw to~u tajpinjan ko~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ, nai patəro~u~uŋan taɾatimo~uɾ taħira i fako~uŋ, mikiɾawaʦ to~u rijar a paɾo~umaʡ ko~u paŋʦaħ,misafo~uno~un a maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ paəɬ~ɮəŋ sa to~u kakaənən, o~u rama i, ira ko~u ʡo~usaw manaʡaŋ taɬ~ɮa kaŋaʡajan no~u paɾafaŋaj a misaɾama. o~u taɾakapaħaj a nijaro~uʡ no~u pasawaɾi a ʡamis i maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ. itini i ʦaaj ka ʡaɾo~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u taɬ~ɮafaŋʦaɾaj a nijaro~uʡ ko~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ. o~u kamaro~uʡan no~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ i pasawaɾi i ɾaəno~u no~u ɾo~uto~uk miɾiɾisaj to~u rijar. ano~u tatra itini i, o~u sakaʡajawaj ko~ura fo~uno~ufo~uno~un a manə*ŋən, wa:ta o~u mamaanaj fo~uno~un kinian, taɬ~ɮkapaħaj a nəŋnəŋən ko~ura a fo~uno~un. itija ħo~u, o~u paħərəkan to~u a tajaɾ no~u o~umaħ, o~u ko~uɾo~uŋ ħo~u ko~u sakatajaɾ i fo~uno~un, saka misaro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a mitaɾo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u ʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw to~u sapakaən to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ. o~u ro~uma i, pasasaʡ ħo~u to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ, saka, ʦaaj kanʦaʡ miɾirəŋo~us a pakaən to~u ko~uɾo~uŋ, ano~u paʦarʦar to~u a masasaʡ, o~u papakaənən to~u ko~u ko~uɾo~uŋ, ko~umaən to~u rəŋo~us ko~u ko~uɾo~uŋ i, ʦaaj kasasaʡ ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a matajaɾ no~u o~umaħ, minisnis to~u aɾanəŋ ħo~u, miro~upaj ħo~u to~u ʦaʡajaj karawis a ʦikaw, mifo~uwaħħo~u to~u nano~um a patajra no~u ɾaəno~uan a fo~uno~un, karo~urajan ko~u ħatiniaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. taŋasa i ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja, maħaħo~uɾo~uħo~uɾo~uɾ to~u iɬ~ɮaŋ ko~u mato~uʡasaj i miwikwikan a faso~uian i po~utaɾ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, o~u wawawawa i , matiʡənaŋ i ʦaʡʦaʡ minəŋnəŋ to~u nika tanəŋaɾ no~u fo~uʡis a faɾatfat i kakarajan. itini i nijaro~uʡ ʦaʡəɬ~ɮəs ko~u pikaɾat no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ to~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, nikao~urira mafaɾi to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja, makako~uəko~u ko~u kamaŋaj ħo~u a wawa misataɾijo~uɾijo~uk i po~utaɾ, mikiħatija to~u nika ħaħo~uɾo~uħo~uɾo~uɾ no~u mato~uʡasaj. o~unini ko~u o~urip no~u iʡajawaj a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u ɾəkakawa no~u finawɾan no~u nijaro~uʡ. o~u nikaɾo~upisak no~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ itiniaj i fəŋpin-sijaŋ no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən sijən ko~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, ro~u~ukai *%, kəb~b~vaɾan **%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. o~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~umin itini i no~uwaɾian a ɾo~uto~uk, miɾiɾis to~u rijar, o~u pasawaɾian a paŋʦaħ ħan, o~u sakaʡaɾo~umanaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jin-ʦo~u~u-min i tajwan. o~u pasawaɾi a ʡamis ko~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ , itini i no~uwaɾian a ɾo~uto~uk, miɾiɾis to~u rijar, mifatər to~u kaɾiŋko~u na itira i fako~uŋ taɾatimo~uɾ taŋasa i maɬ~ɮawɬ~ɮaw, saka pasawaɾi a ʡamis ħan. i tiniaj i fəŋb~b~vin-sjaŋ (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən-sijən (*** so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam ) ko~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ a nijaro~uʡ. o~u maɾaɾo~uʡo~uŋ a nijaro~u , o~u tiŋaɾaw a nijaro~u, o~u fako~uŋ a nijaro~u, o~u ħaʦiɾiwan a nijaro~u, o~u tiɬ~ɮaan a nijaro~u, o~u mako~utaʡaj a nijaro~u, o~u ɾaəno~u a nijaro~u, o~u tiʦiɾan a nijaro~u, o~u ʦawiʡa nijaro~u ato~u tafo~u~u*an a nijaro~u, mo~uətəp a nijaro~u ko~u pipo~uɾo~uŋan. o~u pito~uo~uran no~u finawɾan o~u pito~uo~uran ko~u finawɾan no~u maɾaɾo~uo~uŋ i, o~ura maʡarawaj a kiwkaj i, ira ko~u to~usa a kinkaj i fataʡan, o~u tiŋsikiw ato~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwkaj, o~u ʦiwɾo~ukiwkaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u ka aɬ~ɮiħaj. kaɾiməɾaan ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u kawas, to~u sakafanaʡ to~u ʡo~urip no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ato~u awaaj to~u ko~u kaka to~u nikafanaʡ to~u ʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ ħo~uw i. itini i ira ko~u pito~uo~uran naŋra, pakajni saʡo~upo~u no~u kiwkaj, maɾo~usakarikəʦ sto~u sakarakat no~u ʡo~urip no~u jinʦo~u~umin, mamaan ʦa ko~u ɬ~ɮəamk no~u sapito~uɾo~un ko~u nijaro~uʡ.
